market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications officially close in 3 days
articles.description: Applications for Startup Battlefield 200 officially close on June 8, 11:59 p.m. PT. Now’s not the time to wait any longer. Secure your shot at competing on the Disrupt Stage at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 this October at San Francisco's Moscone West.

articles.title: Bitcoin bears face $2.6B trap as BTC funding rate drops: Is a short squeeze brewing?
articles.description: Bitcoin bears piled into short positions as BTC price slid to $60,000. Will the $2.6 billion in short leverage lead to an upside squeeze?

articles.title: Why diehard bitcoin purists aren’t sweating the massive price crash that wiped out $200 billion
articles.description: Mati Greenspan, Michael Saylor and Jameson Lopp blamed the AI boom for draining capital from bitcoin. Meanwhile, Jack Mallers refrained from sharing an outlook but recommended buying the dip.

articles.title: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute
articles.description: The companies announced the deal on Friday, just one week ahead of SpaceX's historic IPO.

articles.title: Kraken offers SpaceX IPO access through xStocks
articles.description: Eligible users in more than 110 markets can register for tokenized SpaceX equity ahead of the company's highly anticipated public listing.

articles.title: Crypto tax in Illinois FY2027 budget is one step away from becoming law
articles.description: The law, part of a budget plan passed by Illinois lawmakers, would put the burden of collecting a 0.2% tax on crypto transactions on a registered broker.

articles.title: AI exposed a massive flaw in top crypto network and experts warn banks could be next
articles.description: After an AI model helped uncover a four-year-old flaw in Zcash, security researchers warn that similar bugs may be hiding across crypto and traditional financial systems.

articles.title: As VC-backed e-bike startups went bankrupt, bootstrapped Lectric grew
articles.description: Lectric, which says the U.S. market is ripe for competition and choice, has launched three new brands in the past six months.

articles.title: The most interesting startups right now want to get you off your phone
articles.description: While the AI fundraising machine keeps breaking its own records, some founders are building in the other direction.  Mirror founder Brynn Putnam just raised money for Board, a startup focused on bringing people together through in-person games and social experiences. Cyberdeck cr

articles.title: Crypto Biz: Nobody told Saylor ‘never sell’
articles.description: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale challenged the “never sell” narrative, while JPMorgan attacked CLARITY and Capital B pursued a huge fundraising plan for BTC.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize clears key hurdle to go public on NYSE
articles.description: The tokenization specialist behind BlackRock's BUIDL fund could begin trading on the NYSE as SEC approves merger registration.

articles.title: Pump.fun bounty platform pays users to tattoo tokens and chase viral stunts
articles.description: Pump.fun launched a new bounty platform where users started funding bizarre memecoin marketing stunts, including forehead tattoos, skydiving as a mascot and setting a vehicle on fire.

articles.title: Supabase doubles valuation to $10B in 8 months
articles.description: Supabase, an example of an open source project becoming a fast-growing company, has greatly benefited from AI tools like Claude, Codex, and other vibe-coding platforms.

articles.title: Saylor says Bitcoin needs ‘disciplined expansion’ as analysts weigh demand reset
articles.description: Michael Saylor’s essay calls for Bitcoin to expand through banks, credit, securities and higher layers while preserving its base layer.

articles.title: Google and FBI warn of ransomware group that sends fake IT workers to hack victims in person
articles.description: Cybercriminals, part of a gang known as Silent Ransom Group, have sent people pretending to be IT support employees to law firms' offices, where the criminals have stolen data using USB drives or remote access tools.

articles.title: Memecoins dogecoin, shiba inu dive 9% as bitcoin nears $60,000
articles.description: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu led losses among major tokens as heavy volume and liquidations overwhelmed support levels, extending a broader risk-off move across crypto markets.

articles.title: 韋伯望遠鏡首次捕捉系外行星一日天氣循環！熱木星早晨多雲，傍晚放晴
articles.description: NASA 詹姆斯韋伯太空望遠鏡近日觀測到一顆距離地球約 700 光年的熱木星系外行星 WASP-94A b，發 […]

articles.title: 挑戰星系演化論！韋伯望遠鏡直擊「比宿主星系更老」的超大質量黑洞
articles.description: 宇宙超大質量黑洞究竟是如何誕生的，一直是天文學界最重要的未解之謎之一。韋伯太空望遠鏡（簡稱 JWST）最近觀測 […]

articles.title: U.S. House tax committee weighs crypto bills, including relief for small transactions
articles.description: Seven draft bills are being circulated by the House Ways and Means Committee ahead of a hearing next week, including proposals to ease small-gain, mining and staking burdens.
